name: PT Dharma Samudera Fishing Industries Tbk
summary: PT Dharma Samudera Fishing Industries Tbk, together with its subsidiary, engages in collecting, processing, marketing, and trading of fishing products in Indonesia. The company provides fish fillet, red snapper, grouper, tuna, king fish, octopus, cuttlefish, barramundi, malabar snapper, squid, and other products. It offers its products under the Daruma, April Spring, Pacific Sun, Indo Gold, Pacific Fresh, Lucky Doll, Malacca, Sumatera, Fantastic, and Magenta brands, as well as exports its products to Japan, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dharma Samudera Fishing Industries Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Marina Berkah Investama.
